name: How to value my case with ongoing chemical exposure effects?

mainEntity.name: How to value my case with ongoing chemical exposure effects?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Sum medical, lost wages, future care, pain via experts; multipliers for toxics.** Settlements average $50k-$1M+[2]. **Key factors:** Life care plans, wage loss projections. **Practical guidance:** Independent medical exam. Negotiate post-MMI. **Experts set true value.**
